h1: The new Quote Builder is here!

headings.text: The new Quote Builder is here!
With this product update, youâll be able to:
Create quotes with different manufacturing processes under the same deal
Create and save multiple draft quotes within one request
Quickly compare quotes in the same page
Replace parts on saved quotes without losing production requirements
Find all the quote documents on your quote page

meta_description: Learn about the features of the new Quote Builder for 3D printing, CNC machining, and sheet metal fabrication to help you get parts into production as quickly and as easily as possible.

sections.heading: The new Quote Builder is here!
sections.text: The new Quote Builder is here! Learn about the features of the new Quote Builder for 3D printing, CNC machining, and sheet metal fabrication to help you get parts into production as quickly and as easily as possible.

sections.heading: With this product update, youâll be able to:
sections.text: You can now build and edit your quotes faster and more easily on the Protolabs Network platform! Today, weâre rolling out a brand new version of the Quote Builder for 3D printing, sheet metal fabrication , and CNC machining. Our long term goal is to build the most advanced platform in the industry, driven by automation. Weâre continuing to polish and refine the flow from our instant quoting engine, to our DfM feedback tool, to immediately sourcing your parts from our extensive, distributed network of manufacturing partners. An essential requirement to achieving this goal is by upgrading the order management side of our platform, starting with our Quote Builder. Learn about how all the n...
